summary: The production artifact is not the development artifact — development affordances do not exist in production (absent, not hidden), enforced by a gate that fails closed with no exceptions.

rules.rule: The shipped production artifact contains zero development affordances — no debug/inspector UI, developer shortcuts, config/runtime backdoors, dev-only global APIs, or output intercepts — where zero means not created, not created-but-hidden.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Enforce the exclusion where the artifact is produced or runs — build-time elimination or a host/origin check that fails closed — never a runtime toggle a user can flip, and no ?debug-style override survives into production.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Satisfy any genuine production diagnostic need by building a designed, reviewed product feature — never by reusing debug infrastructure or leaving debug tooling on.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: The production artifact explains its own denials deterministically: every blocking decision emits a stable, machine-readable reason code with PII-safe evidence, classified by severity, correlated by a request-scoped trace id, through a read-only diagnosis surface that never mutates, enforces, or repairs.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Verify the exclusion with an automated gate (CI and/or pre-merge/pre-push hook) that fails closed, blocking the merge with an actionable message if a development affordance can reach the production artifact.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: No exceptions — no just-this-once, no behind-a-flag-for-staging-in-prod, no team-only shortcut; an apparent exception is either a product feature to design or a gap in the gate to close, never a backdoor.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate
